/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libbase_interfaces_demo__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libbase_interfaces_demo__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/base_interfaces_demo__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/base_interfaces_demo/srv/add_ints__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/yushutian/ws01_plumbing/build/base_interfaces_demo:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libbase_interfaces_demo__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
